The '''Sharpshooter V''' was a [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]] manufactured by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]].

==Description==
The Sharpshooter V was a modified [[Blaster carbine/Legends|blaster carbine]] produced by [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech Industries]]. The weapon was fitted with a targeting sight for accuracy at long range. The multi-spectrum scope was fitted with [[infrared enhancer]]s for use at night, and could magnify the image while an inbuilt [[microcomputer]] enhanced the image to clear smoke or haze.<ref name="ISB" />

The blaster bolt fired by the Sharpshooter V was smaller and tighter than standard [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]]. The bolt did not dissipate as quickly as other blasters over long distance, giving the Sharpshooter V an advantage during long range battles. However, the range increase came at a cost, which was the power of the bolt.<ref name="ISB" /> The Sharpshooter V was marketed at 1,200 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="ISB2" />

==History==
Due to the price tag, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] kept its spending on the Sharpshooter V at a modest level. As a result, they were not generally assigned to standard formations, but were reserved for special [[Commando/Legends|commando]] units. The Empire allowed BlasTech to produce a weaker version for the civilian market, called the [[Hunter V]], which was cheaper and marketed as a [[Sporting blaster/Legends|sporting blaster]].<ref name="ISB" />
